summary: Comprehensive frontend E2E testing on the walkFellas Expo mobile app (mobile viewport 390x844). All critical flows PASSED: (1) Auth screen renders both WALKER/STAFF tabs with working PIN numpad; (2) Admin login → dashboard with all 5 metric cards (TOTAL SALES €26.00, ACTIVE WALKERS, DISCREPANCIES, WASTE UNITS, PENDING RESTOCK); (3) Admin Events NEW modal creates event with unique code (verified new event TST-code appears in list); (4) Admin Catalog event chips render, NEW product modal creates SKU (verified persistence); (5) Admin Team lists 4 walkers with NEW WALKER / NEW STAFF modals both accessible; (6) Supervisor login → /(supervisor)/queue with RESTOCK|SHIFT CLOSE segmented control; (7) Supervisor Walkers tab lists all 4 walkers with ASSIGN BAG modal + product steppers + CONFIRM BAG working; (8) Walker login (FEST01 / 1234) → POS grid shows 6 SKUs (no NO OPEN SHIFT after bag assignment); tapping sku- cards adds to cart and CONFIRM SALE succeeds; (9) Walker Restock steppers + REQUEST works; (10) Walker Waste flow: product select + category chip + qty + SUBMIT works without photo (camera disabled on web as expected); (11) Walker Close Shift steppers + CLOSE SHIFT succeeds ('Shift closed. Awaiting supervisor.' toast). Minor RN deprecation warning observed. No red-screen errors, no API 5xx.

issues: Modal opens as bottom-anchored sheet; on 390x844 viewport the modal content (name / event chips / PIN / submit) extends below the fold and requires internal scroll. Not blocking (modal is scrollable), but consider making it centered or full-screen for small devices.
CREATE button is near bottom of the sheet; on 390x844 mobile it can be just outside the initial viewport without scroll — works, but tighten spacing or shift button up for one-shot tap.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Search for pointerEvents props passed at root level and migrate to style.pointerEvents. Reference: appears on auth screen, supervisor queue, and admin dashboard renders.

action_items: Migrate deprecated `pointerEvents` prop usages to `style.pointerEvents` to silence RN warning.
(Optional UX) Improve modal layouts (NEW EVENT / NEW WALKER) so the primary CTA is in the initial viewport on small phones (390px width).
No functional fixes required — all E2E happy paths pass.
critical_code_review_comments: api.ts correctly reads process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL; token stored via SecureStore on native and localStorage on web — good.

All interactive elements have testID coverage (tab-walker, tab-staff, pin-0..9, sku-*, confirm-sale, assign-*, bag-*-plus, confirm-bag, submit-restock, submit-waste, submit-close, new-event, ev-create, new-product, pr-create, new-walker/new-staff, t-submit) — excellent testability.
index.tsx auth screen wraps text in <Text>, uses KeyboardAvoidingView, and StyleSheet.create() — compliant with RN patterns.
seed_data_creation: Test used auto-seeded data (FEST01, admin/sup/walker credentials from POST /api/seed). Additional artefacts created during testing: 2 test events (TST-*), 1 test product (TST-*), 1 restock request, 1 waste log, 1 sale, 1 bag assignment, 1 closed shift. Prefixed with TEST_/TST for identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend fully functional. Test seed adds 2-3 extra events (TST-*) and a few products/sale/restock/waste records per run — dashboard metric numbers will drift across iterations. Reset via seed if pristine baseline needed. Viewport 390x844 recommended. Camera flow is web-blocked (expected). Some Playwright clicks on modal chips near bottom edge need scrollIntoView or JS-dispatched click.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs to root-cause. Initial Playwright script had two false-positive failures caused by viewport-clipped elements (ev-create, t-event-FEST01) that resolved when scrollIntoView + JS click were used; not app bugs.
